title: hedysarum humile var. bovei
intro: Hedysarum humile var. bovei, also known as the dwarf hedysarum or Bove's hedysarum, is a plant species within the Fabaceae family, characterized by its small, white flowers and shrub-like growth. The plant is rich in medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to increase urine production, which has been used to treat conditions such as kidney stones and bladder issues. The health benefits of Hedysarum humile var. bovei include its diuretic properties, which can help to flush out toxins and excess fluids from the body, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and reduce inflammation. In traditional herbal medicine, the plant is often prepared as a tea or infusion, or used in combination with other herbs to create a medicinal decoction.
